description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

v1.52.0

The weather graph now shows the current time and wind information, making rainfall easier to read.

• 🕐 Current time line on weather graph — A blue vertical line on today's graph showing the current time (moves as time passes)
• 🌬 Wind direction and speed displayed on graph — Arrows every 3 hours at the top of the graph show wind direction and strength, plus wind speed in m/s. We also corrected the wind speed strength display units
• 🌙 Moon marker show/hide — Tap the moon phase icon to toggle the moon display on the graph (initially hidden)
• 🌧 Light rain and precipitation probability easier to see — Light rain bars are now visible, and precipitation probability range is clearer
• 🚏 Save bus stops to home screen from browser — Use "Add" on the bus stop page to save that stop
• 📅 Fixed date picker issue — Fixed the problem where tapping a date on iPhone sometimes wouldn't open the calendar

v1.51.0

Settings on iPhone's home screen app now carry over.

• 📱 Settings no longer disappear when added to home screen — Garbage collection day and favorite shops set in Safari now carry over to the home screen app (previously they would clear)
• 🧭 "Add to home screen" instructions are clearer — The setup steps are now shown in an easy-to-understand layout
• 🚏 Bus stop "Save to home screen" and "Display card" easier to see — Buttons are now larger in card format
• ⭐ Save up to 5 favorite shops without logging in — Log in to save unlimited shops
